events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: over-greasing purged the seal — a sequence violation (grease added past the OEM-calculated quantity/relief-purge step instead of stopping at fresh-grease-out). Decision is **fail**, risk **high**: work must stop, the machine isolated, the damaged seal inspected/replaced, and correct grease quantity/relief procedure followed before returning to service.
